meta.question: Which "holding_bin" areas still contain 2016/2017 artifacts?
meta.finalAnswer:
The following "holding_bin" areas still contain 2016/2017 artifacts:

1. **holding_bin** (at root level `http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/package/holding_bin`)
   - Contains: YY_2016, YY_2017

2. **holding_bin** (at `TMT::Project::Views::TMT-SE::_18_0_5_c0402fd_1468273748052_698417_176773_no_project::holding_bin`)
   - Contains: YY_2016

The other 3 holding_bin packages found in the model (TMT-APS-SE views and use cases) do not contain any 2016/2017 artifacts.

events.output: I'll help you find which "holding_bin" areas still contain 2016/2017 artifacts. Let me start by exploring the model to find elements with "holding_bin" in their name.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?type ?name WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name . 
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("holding_bin"))) 
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 25

request.reason: Found 5 holding_bin packages. Need to explore their contents to find which ones contain 2016/2017 artifacts. Let me map the properties of one holding_bin to understand its structure.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?prop (COUNT(*) as ?count) WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name . 
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("holding_bin")))
  FILTER(STR(?elem) = "http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/package/TMT::Project::Work%2520Packages::Telescope::WorkPackages::Control::Alignment%2520and%2520Phasing%2520System::Systems%2520Engineering::09%2520Views::TMT-APS-SE::_18_0_5_c0402fd_1468273729899_905102_176772_no_project::holding_bin")
  ?elem ?prop ?value .
} 
GROUP BY ?prop 
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?child ?childName ?childType WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name . 
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("holding_bin")))
  FILTER(STR(?elem) = "http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/package/TMT::Project::Work%2520Packages::Telescope::WorkPackages::Control::Alignment%2520and%2520Phasing%2520System::Systems%2520Engineering::09%2520Views::TMT-APS-SE::_18_0_5_c0402fd_1468273729899_905102_176772_no_project::holding_bin")
  ?elem vocab:Element_ownedElement ?child .
  ?child rdf:type ?childType .
  OPTIONAL { ?child vocab:NamedElement_name ?childName }
}
LIMIT 25

request.reason: Found that some holding_bin packages contain children like YY_2016 and YY_2017. Need to get all children of all holding_bins to identify which ones contain 2016/2017 artifacts.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?holdingBin ?hbName ?child ?childName WHERE {
  ?holdingBin vocab:NamedElement_name ?hbName . 
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?hbName)), LCASE("holding_bin")))
  ?holdingBin vocab:Element_ownedElement ?child .
  ?child vocab:NamedElement_name ?childName .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?childName)), "2016") || CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?childName)), "2017"))
}
LIMIT 50

request.reason: Found the holding_bin areas containing 2016/2017 artifacts. Two unique holding_bin packages contain these artifacts: one at TMT::Project::Views::TMT-SE (contains YY_2016) and one at the root level (contains both YY_2016 and YY_2017).
